EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} from host {event_src.host} created the file "{object.fullpath}" on "{datafield3}"
The user {subject.account.name} from host {event_src.host} failed to copy the file "{object.fullpath}" from "{object.path}" to "{datafield5}" on "{datafield3}"
The process "{subject.process.name}" on host {event_src.host} was denied write access to the file "{object.fullpath}" on the device "{datafield3}"
The user {subject.account.name} from host {event_src.host} wrote to the file "{object.fullpath}" on "{datafield3}"
The user {subject.account.name} from host {event_src.host} deleted the file "{object.fullpath}" on "{datafield3}"
The user {subject.account.name} from host {event_src.host} failed to create the file "{object.fullpath}" on "{datafield3}"
The user {subject.account.name} from host {event_src.host} failed to delete the file "{object.fullpath}" on "{datafield3}"
The user {subject.account.name} from host {event_src.host} copied the file "{object.fullpath}" from "{object.path}" to "{datafield5}" on "{datafield3}"
